title: Luxpad 280 x 150mm Things To Do Planner - Printed Template (120 Sheets)
features: Keep track of all of your tasks and appointments with this handy 'Things to Do' planner, measuring 280 x 150mm.
120 sheets pre-printed with 'Things to Do' and 'Appointments / Key Notes' over a double page spread so you can check all of your tasks and appointments at a glance.
This pad is wire bound and perforated so pages can be easily torn out or simply turned over for reference at a later date.
The wire binding also allows the pad to lay flat and sit neatly on your desk while open on the current page.
The durable gloss laminated cover helps protect your notes from being creased or torn.
description: From the manufacturer Quality Paper At Luxpad we use only high quality, educational grade paper. This means you can write front and back, utilising every single page without worrying about bleedthrough. Plus the 75gsm paper won't make your ink smudge. Perforated Pages Pages are micro-perforated so they can be neatly removed once all your tasks are complete. Alternatively, fold them over for reference at a later date thanks to the wire binding. Pre-Printed Layout 240 pages with 'Appointments' and 'Things to Do' printed over a double page spread. So you can check all of your tasks and appointments at a glance. Practical Wire Binding Wire binding offers practicality as well as durability when it comes to note taking. This construction type ensures that the notebook lays flat on your desk, providing a stable surface for jotting down thoughts or scribbling notes without interference from other pages. This allows you to concentrate on your ideas without constantly adjusting the notebook. Additionally, wire binding facilitates effortless page turning, making it easy to flip through your notes or refer back to previous pages. Durability The durability of wire binding ensures that your notebook remains intact over time, unlike glued bindings that may deteriorate through usage.
